resources.string: FitLife uses your camera to analyze your form in real time. All processing happens on your device and nothing is uploaded or stored.
Before we ask for camera access, we want to explain why we need it. FitLife only uses the camera for live on-device form analysis during training sessions. Nothing is uploaded or stored.
Audio-only guidance is available, so you can keep training without camera access.
Waiting for the system camera prompt...
Something went wrong with the camera. You can continue with audio guidance instead.
Your form stability has decreased. Take a short rest or focus on your technique.
Lighting is too low for reliable form tracking. Follow the audio guidance for your session.
